rules.requirement: Lock-Out Tag-Out (LOTO) isolation permit must be verified by a certified safety officer prior to opening any pump casing.
Fencing of machinery: Every moving part of a transmission machinery and every dangerous part of any other machinery shall be securely fenced.
Hydrostatic pressure testing of all pressure vessels must be conducted every 5 years by a competent person.
Daily thermal imaging scan on bearing housings of P-101 and other critical process pumps to monitor overheating.
